behavior_in_task_description.reason: All test-asserted strings (MQ_MAX_TABLET = 1180, iPad Air comment, 'not used for form factor detection', getFormFactor signature, getFormFactor?.(editorWidth, editorHeight), removal of desktopUIMode/formFactor) are named in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what needs changing and target values but doesn't give full code replacements; agent must still implement App.tsx logic and areEqual handling.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_app_uses_getformfactor requires exact string 'getFormFactor?.(editorWidth, editorHeight)' — alternate correct fixes using different parameter names or non-chained invocation would fail; test_index_handles_getformfactor and exact signature EditorInterface["formFactor"] similarly constrain implementation.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Most fail-to-pass tests are grep/string checks (test_mq_max_tablet_value, test_uioptions_has_getformfactor, test_app_uses_getformfactor, etc.); only typecheck/lint/format actually execute code, and they don't verify behavior.

test_not_tautological.reason: Each f2p test checks a specific string or absence that requires making the actual edit; a stub cannot satisfy them.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover MQ value, iPad comment, desktop comment, getFormFactor type+signature, formFactor removal, desktopUIMode removal, App.tsx usage, index.tsx memo handling, and typecheck/lint/format.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have descriptive names and docstrings labeling fail-to-pass vs pass-to-pass.

no_typos.reason: Paths and symbol names match across instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files but not line numbers; file identification is part of the task scope given.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code task, not an agentmd-edits config task.
